description: A Department of Labor slogan graphic combining a portrait of Trump with a quoted news excerpt. The background is a black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump in a dark suit and tie (with a small American flag lapel pin) walking through a colonnade, looking toward the camera. A large bold white serif headline reads 'AMERICANS FIRST!'. Below sits a white rounded rectangle text card headed by the 'Newsweek' logo containing the quote: 'The U.S. Department of Labor (DOL) has vowed to ensure employers enforce H-1B visa rules and "prioritize qualified Americans" over foreign workers in a crackdown on discriminatory hiring dubbed "Project Firewall." ... The government's renewed focus on preventing discrimination against American workers reverberates through key industries, potentially impacting technology, research and corporate hiring.'
notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST! / Project Firewall / prioritize qualified Americans over foreign workers
